name: Raid Manager
description: Raid coordination tools — countdown timer and raid warning banner with chat command integration.
author: Stellar

added: Countdown timer via /ct <seconds> displayed as a HUD overlay.
Raid warning via /rw <text> with configurable display size, active channels, and warning mode.
Use In-game Warning toggle — shows the game's native notice banner with victory audio instead of the custom overlay (default on).
